name: Chicken with Peanut Butter Sauce
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Chicken, cut into - 2 tbsp Tomato sauce
-serving pieces, or just - 3 cups Chicken broth
-use boned, skinned breasts - 1/2 tbsp Chopped parsley
Salt & pepper to taste - 1/2 tbsp Thyme
recipeInstructions:
1. Season chicken with salt and pepper.
2. Heat oil in a frying pan and brown the chicken pieces on all sides.
3. Transfer chicken to a large pot and keep warm.
4. Add onions to the frying pan and saute until translucent.
5. Add curry powder and tomato sauce. Stir until smooth, then add 1 cup of broth. Bring to a boil.
6. Add parsley, thyme, and bay leaves. Pour the mixture over chicken pieces. Simmer for 1 hour, or until chicken is tender.
7. Combine peanut butter with 2 cups of broth in a separate saucepan. Season with salt and pepper.
8. When the sauce is smooth, pour it over the chicken pieces. Simmer for 10 to 15 minutes more.
9. Serve with rice.
